title: Craftable Vanilla Lights
description: A simple datapack that adds 4 new crafting recipes to the game : Ochre Froglight, Pearlescent Froglight, Verdant Froglight and (a better crafting recipe for) Sea Lantern.
body:
# Craftable Vanilla Lights

### Craftable Vanilla Lights datapack adds 4 new recipes to the game. All recipes provide 2 blocks.

This mod does not change vanilla game, it only adds four new crafting recipes. You can still use the regular crafting recipe for sea lantern and get froglights from frogs eating magma cubes, good luck with that.

## Ochre Froglight Recipe :

![Ochre froglight recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ceddada86e8f4d40cea8a2acfc0c6f71eb6d6fd.png)

- Leather
- Glowstone
- Yellow Dye
- White Dye

## Pearlescent Froglight Recipe

![Pearlescent froglight recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bc9cf7ad0e85f490ec92f7d69e2229d5092a63d.png)

- Leather
- Glowstone
- Magenta Dye
- White Dye

## Verdant Froglight Recipe

![Verdant froglight recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/159822cd710c42079a4941b315e67838907fd1c0.png)

- Leather
- Glowstone
- Lime Dye
- White Dye

## Sea Lantern Recipe

![Sea lantern recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f0ec9e7eef1b1049e49c02f1d6a809b194a95ab.png)

- Nautilus shell
- Glowstone
